CSV data is created inline using shell script (cat > ... << EOF) with no external data sources. The data is fictional example data for a retail company.

privileged_info_summary: The Business Capability Heatmap task uses synthetic example data for a retail company with 4 business domains (Supply Chain, Sales & Marketing, HR & Support, Finance) and 10 enterprise capabilities distributed across them. The data is created by the setup_task.sh script and includes capability names, their parent domains, and maturity status (Healthy, At Risk, Critical). Color codes are Light Green (#d5e8d4) for Healthy, Light Yellow (#fff2cc) for At Risk, and Light Red (#f8cecc) for Critical. All 10 capabilities are correctly mapped to their domains and statuses. The task files are expected at /home/ga/Desktop/retail_capabilities.csv for input, /home/ga/Diagrams/capability_map.drawio for the diagram output, and /home/ga/Diagrams/capability_map.pdf for the PDF export.
